title: Born-with provenance certificate (v1)
description: The certificate a stamped app is born with: what it was stamped from and the agentic posture it was born under. Owned by the enrahitu template (spec 012); the factory emits the instance at stamp time. The template repo carries this schema but never a cert instance.

certVersion.description: Certificate schema version. v1 is hash-anchored via the platform ledger; signing is reserved for certVersion 2 (spec 012 §7).

commit.description: Full 40-hex SHA of the template commit stamped from.

agenticPostureBinding.description: Always explicit. A cert that omits the posture or admits a defaulted one is invalid by schema: a silently defaulted posture is the failure mode this design exists to kill.

stampedAt.description: ISO 8601 instant in UTC (trailing Z required).
